title: Come and Dine, Says Jesus
summary: “Jesus saith unto them, Come and dine. And none of the disciples durst ask him, Who art thou? knowing that it was the Lord. Jesus then cometh, and taketh bread, and giveth them, and fish likewise.” John 21:53-54 We live in a difficult time. Even people in rich countries are suffering from the combined effects of a war in the Ukraine, such as inflation which affects food and fuel prices. Several people are afraid of the coming winter and how to stay warm. This message is intended to give you hope; Jesus Christ is still our Jehovah Jireh. “And Abraham said, My son, God will provide himself a lamb for a burnt offering: so they went both of them together” (Gen 22:8). The God who kept us through the difficult months of the Covid-19 virus will also see us through this trial. Amen!
